spec_match.rationale: Directly tests the native background-clip: border-area CSS property across different border styling values (solid, double, dashed, rounded) using actual CSS declarations.

interactive.rationale: Interactivity is high: range resizer slider to adjust border width in real-time and a set of gradient buttons.

edge_cases.rationale: Has robust feature detection and handles color value resolving for inline styling nicely.

design_system.rationale: Crisp visual grid, clear cards, and readable comparison code tables.

summary: A highly compliant, interactive gradient gallery showcasing border-area across several boundary shapes with direct comparisons to pre-150 hack styling structures.
